type_error_policy: Pycairo runtime TypeError assertions map to MoonBit compile-time rejection. Python file objects map to separate path and callback APIs, and mapped-image lifetime restrictions map to deliberately absent public operations. Every upstream TypeError test retains generated static evidence plus runtime evidence for valid behavior.

runtime: src/tests/surface/pycairo/surface_pycairo_parity_test.mbt::pycairo surface context manager fixture
test_context_manager.adaptation: Surface::with_finished provides deterministic scoped cleanup and preserves pycairo's post-scope SurfaceFinished behavior.

pub impl Hash for Surface
